role: This directory contains the automated workflow configurations that drive the CI/CD pipeline, documentation deployment, package release, architecture compliance checks, and issue management for the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: Collectively, these workflow files enforce code quality through linting, building, testing, and validation across multiple Node.js versions; automate the build and deployment of project documentation to GitHub Pages; handle npm package publishing and GitHub Release creation from version tags; provide a template for architecture synchronization and compliance checking in pull requests; and manage stale issues and pull requests with automatic labeling and closure.

children.role: Define the automated CI pipeline for the ArchSpine project to ensure code quality, build success, and pre-release validation.
Automates the build and deployment of project documentation to GitHub Pages on changes to documentation or package files.
This document defines the automated release pipeline for the ArchSpine project, triggered by version tags.
GitHub Actions workflow template for automated architecture sync and compliance checking in pull requests
